posts.author: jdas (Joanna )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone, and thanks for your help in advance.

I have set up an automation so when someone completed a form we are
A) notified there is a new item.
b) when we change the status it send a copy of the form and files uploaded to the person who completed the form

The issue is, when i ran a test, the files show as links (which is fine) but when i try to open the files via the email received I get the following:

image969×198 6.77 KB

One file has been saved as an excel and the other as a pdf. any Ideas how to resolve the issue.

thanks again

joanna

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml: Same issue here. Must be a Monday bug.
